name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry vintage briefcase, vintage Napa cowhide + classic check fabric. 🥰🥰 The snap fastening hardware is exquisite, featuring Burberry hardware logos. Comes with a long shoulder strap for shoulder, crossbody, or hand carry. Size: 26x7x22cm
